summary: Reframed the opening so chapter 5 no longer repeats chapter 6's temporal-arrival scaffold, and added a departure beat that establishes Riva's towing limit from Hymn Cut into the next chapter.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to begin from Daro's bodily perception of the singing rather than a matching 'By the time ...' arrival construction.
Added Riva's explicit rule that only the boats already waiting at Hymn Cut may tie on.
Added a follow-up line noting she repeats that limit before departure, smoothing the handoff to the chapter 6 wake.
